scenes.description: Omaru Polka performs 'Girls' Legend U' with guests AZKi, Ookami Mio, Oozora Subaru, Momosuzu Nene, Shishiro Botan, and Yukihana Lamy.
Transition and interlude as the stage resets for Polka's solo performance.
Omaru Polka performs her solo song 'STARTING OVER'.

subtitles.original: 夏も秋も冬も越え
subtitles.english: Beyond the summers, the autumns, and the winters

subtitles.original: 願い焦がれ走れ
subtitles.english: Run with longing for your wishes

subtitles.original: あぁ 勝利へ
subtitles.english: Ah, towards victory!

subtitles.original: No stop, no stop to finish!
subtitles.english: No stop, no stop to finish!

subtitles.original:
STARTING OVER
作詞：さめざめおり　作曲・編曲：柳田圭介
subtitles.english:
STARTING OVER
Lyrics: Samezameori / Composition & Arrangement: Yanagida Keisuke

subtitles.original: It's finally the true end
subtitles.english: It's finally the true end

subtitles.original: I'm ready for... my destiny
subtitles.english: I'm ready for... my destiny

subtitles.original: It's finally the true end
subtitles.english: It's finally the true end

subtitles.original: I'm ready for... STARTING OVER
subtitles.english: I'm ready for... STARTING OVER

subtitles.original: やっと幕を下ろせた 最後の瞬間まで
subtitles.english: Finally, I was able to lower the curtain, until the very last moment

subtitles.original: わたしは精一杯に わたしをやりきった
subtitles.english: I gave it my all, and played my part to the very end

subtitles.original: 終演の続きは 誰も知らなくていい
subtitles.english: No one needs to know what follows the end of the show

subtitles.original: 涙を置いて 新しい旅に出よう
subtitles.english: Let's leave our tears behind and set out on a new journey

subtitles.original: 熱狂はあなたを選ぶ 違う結末だっただけ
subtitles.english: The excitement chooses you; it was just a different outcome

subtitles.original: 同じ愛になれなかった Destiny
subtitles.english: A destiny that couldn't become the same love

subtitles.original: これまでの全てを 差し出すような愛だった
subtitles.english: It was a love where I offered up everything I had

subtitles.original: 世界の意味が変わるくらいに 肯定された気がしたんだ
subtitles.english: I felt so affirmed that it felt like the meaning of the world had changed

subtitles.original: 何気なさの中で 気づけた最初の奇跡が
subtitles.english: The first miracle I noticed in the midst of the mundane...

subtitles.original: あなたでよかった わたしでよかった 心から思えたよ
subtitles.english: ...was that I'm glad it was you, and I'm glad it was me. I truly felt that from my heart

subtitles.original: ずっと遠い未来も ちゃんと覚えていよう
subtitles.english: Let's remember this well, even in the far-off future

subtitles.original: 自分の抱きしめかた 明日の願いかた
subtitles.english: How to embrace myself, how to wish for tomorrow

subtitles.original: あなたがいなくても わたしの片隅で
subtitles.english: Even if you're not there, in a corner of my heart...

subtitles.original: 優しい光 消えたりしないとわかる
subtitles.english: ...I know a gentle light will never fade

subtitles.original: 今はまだ手を振れるほど 道は別れたばかりで
subtitles.english: For now, I can only wave goodbye, as our paths have only just split

subtitles.original: 後ろ髪に風を感じながら
subtitles.english: While feeling the wind pulling at the back of my hair

subtitles.original: それまでの全てが あなたに出会うためだった
subtitles.english: Everything up until then was for the sake of meeting you

subtitles.original: どの瞬間もムダじゃないこと 本当の意味で知れたから
subtitles.english: Because I've learned in the truest sense that no moment was wasted

subtitles.original: 次の曲がり角も 自分らしさで選べるはず
subtitles.english: I should be able to choose the next turn in my own way

subtitles.original: いつかに繋がる 新しい一歩 信じて歩き出そう
subtitles.english: Let's start walking, believing in the new step that leads to a "someday"

subtitles.original: 心から誰かを愛せた あの日々は
subtitles.english: Those days when I could love someone from the bottom of my heart...

subtitles.original: 間違いなくわたしの Destiny Ah
subtitles.english: ...were undoubtedly my destiny, ah

subtitles.original: これまでの全てが 新しい力をくれる
subtitles.english: Everything up until now gives me new strength

subtitles.original: どの瞬間もムダじゃないなら 何が起きても大丈夫だから
subtitles.english: If no moment is wasted, then I'll be fine no matter what happens

subtitles.original: 次の物語も 自分らしさで選べるはず
subtitles.english: I should be able to choose the next story in my own way

subtitles.original: いつかに繋がる わたしのはじまり 信じて歩き出そう
subtitles.english: Let's start walking, believing in my beginning that leads to a "someday"
